name: vision-workshop
description: Clarifies company vision, success metrics, and strategic milestones. Creates the north star before any work begins.

tasks.title: Define company vision, success metrics, and strategic milestones
tasks.description: Refine the company goal into a clear vision statement, define measurable success metrics, and establish strategic milestones. Document in docs/VISION.md. This becomes the north star for all downstream planning.
